untranslatable_reason: Signal requires alternative data indicators (web traffic, fund flows, positioning data) and volume percentile thresholds that are not available in the allowed indicator set. Volume percentile rankings and alternative data sources cannot be expressed using only the provided OHLCV and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume analysis and bb_bandwidth as proxy for spread width. The alternative_data_percentile condition (web traffic, fund flows, positioning) and instrument-specific percentile rankings relative to sector averages cannot be implemented without external data feeds. The volume_percentile_threshold and spread_percentile_threshold require lookback period calculations and sector-relative comparisons not supported by available indicators.
